arts.ttl: PLAYER RATINGS | PSG 4-1 Monaco: Kvaratskhelia opens account for Parisians and Dembélé scores double
arts.sum: With Paris Saint-Germain’s lead at the top of Ligue 1 verging on unassailable, what would usually have been a high-stakes clash between two of France’s major players may well have…

arts.ttl: Kvaratskhelia scores his first PSG goal as Ligue 1 leader routs Monaco
arts.sum: He showed a bit of both in the 54th minute, controlling a quick pass with his right foot, cutting cleverly inside Christian Mawissa and scooping the ball off balance over goalkeeper Radoslaw Majecki. PSG led in the sixth minute when Vitinha curled a free kick into the bottom right corner.

arts.ttl: Video: Watch Ousmane Dembélé Extend Hot Streak with Brace vs. Monaco
arts.sum: Since the calendar turned to 2025, Ousmane Dembélé has become a goal-scoring machine. The Frenchman has scored 13 goals in the new year and two of those goals came on Friday night against AS Monaco at the Parc des Princes. arts.ttl: Video: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia Pulls Fabulous Fake to Score First PSG Goal Against Monaco
arts.sum: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia scored his first Paris Saint-Germain goal on Friday night at the Parc des Princes. After ending the first half one-all, the Ligue 1 leaders put on their scoring boots in the second half to take the lead over Monaco. arts.ttl: PSG Told to Go All In on £150M-Rated Newcastle Talent to Beat Liverpool, Arsenal
arts.sum: The winter transfer window has closed, and Alexander Isak will be staying at Newcastle United. While there wasn’t much talk about a move this winter, it’s clear that several clubs will be targeting him come summer. arts.ttl: Official | Luis Enrique extends PSG contract
arts.sum: Luis Enrique has extended his contract as PSG head coach, the Ligue 1 leaders have announced. The Spaniard has put pen to paper on a contract set to expire in…

arts.ttl: Official | Nuno Mendes, Achraf Hakimi and Vitinha sign PSG contract extensions
arts.sum: PSG have announced this Friday that three of their key players – right-back Achraf Hakimi (26), left-back Nuno Mendes (22) and midfielder Vitinha (24) – have signed long-term contract extensions.…

arts.ttl: Nuno Mendes’ Contract Extension Details Emerge After Recent Man Utd Transfer Rumors
arts.sum: Manchester United had their sight set on securing Nuno Mendes as transfer rumors emerged. With Ruben Amorim at the helm at Old Trafford, it came as no surprise that he wanted a player who he coached at Sporting Lisbon. arts.ttl: Liverpool Poised to Rival Man City, Man Utd for Nine-Goal Contributor After PSG Exit
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain initially opted for a short-term solution by loaning Xavi Simons to RB Leipzig for another season. However, his future is now settled, as the German club has secured him on a permanent transfer. Last September, Christian Falk reported that Manchester City and Liverpool were keeping a close watch on Simons’ situation.
